Image 72: Bitcoin$BTC vs Passive Income: What Would You Choose?

BlackRock has launched BITA, a new Bitcoin ETF targeting 15–25% annual yield through a covered-call strategy. This raises an interesting question: would investors rather chase Bitcoin's full upside or earn a steady 15–25% yield?

The catch is that BITA generates income by selling call options, which means investors give up part of Bitcoin's gains during major rallies. That's why many Bitcoin maximalists are already criticizing the product.

results.title: Deep dive on Hilo: On-chain Degeneracy Optimized - Flagship.FYI
results.content:
The platform also has a unique revenue model, with a % platform tax that supports the project in various ways. A portion of this tax is burned, while the rest is allocated for revenue sharing, staking rewards, and other operational costs. Furthermore, Hilo offers a staking feature where users can earn revenue by staking their tokens. The staking pool is designed to grow continuously, ensuring that rewards are consistent and lucrative for stakers.

Hilo's tokenomics are transparent and user-centric. There's a 6% tax on both buys and sells, which is used to strengthen the platform's liquidity and cover project expenses. Notably, no tokens were airdropped or given to the team, ensuring that 100% of the supply is in circulation. [...] ## A Sustainable Growth Model

Choosing Hilo for binary predictions offers several distinct advantages. Firstly, users are shielded from the risk of liquidation. Unlike perpetual futures trading, which can be perilous in fluctuating markets, Hilo's binary options mechanism focuses solely on the directional momentum of a token. This means users don't have to fret about sudden price swings; only the final price at the close of the pool matters. [...] Another significant benefit is the bi-directional access to tokens that might not be listed on traditional exchanges. Many Ethereum-based ERC-20 tokens, despite having a strong community backing, might not make it to exchanges due to volume criteria. While these tokens might be available on DEXs, the only options there are market buys or sells. This can leave token holders vulnerable to volatility. However, with Hilo's binary options, users can bet on token prices dropping, offering them more flexibility, especially with low MarketCap tokens on Ethereum.

## Let's stay connected!

Sign up for the Hilo newsletter to learn about our latest offers and news.

I agree to receive communications from Hilo about its offer. I can withdraw my consent at any time. For more information, see our Privacy Policy.

## Footer

### Useful links

### Help

### Inside Hilo [...] 1. Sign out of the Hilo app by going to the Menu screen (last icon on the right at the bottom of the screen), by scrolling down and tapping on Log out. Sign in again using your email address and password, check to see if the issue has been resolved. Go to step 2 if the issue is not resolved.

2. Disconnect the network cable (the one that looks like a telephone cable) from the hub for about 10 seconds and then reconnect it. When the indicator light becomes solid green and stops flashing, check to see if the issue has been resolved. Go to step 3 if the issue is not resolved.

3. In the app, go to the Menu screen and tap on My hub, then on Restart my hub. Wait about a minute and check to see if the issue has been resolved. Go to step 4 if the issue is not resolved. Binance is not responsible for any losses you may incur. For more information, please refer to our Terms of Use and Risk Warning. [...] ### 6

Which Cryptocurrencies Can I Buy on Binance?

Through the Binance Web3 Wallet, you can swap for thousands of tokens available on supported DEXs. On the Binance Exchange (CEX), over 500+ cryptocurrencies are listed and available for purchase. Buying HILO is only supported via the Binance Web3 Wallet.

### 7

Can I Buy Less Than One HILO?

Yes, HILO, like most cryptocurrencies, is divisible. You can buy even a fraction of it when swapping with your stablecoin.

### 8

How Can I Store My HILO?

You can store your HILO securely in your Binance Web3 Wallet. You can also trade it for other tokens or use features like Simple Yield to earn passive income. Always back up your recovery phrase and enable two-factor authentication for maximum security.
